name: Gambier Gold Corp.
summary: Gambier Gold Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of resource properties in Canada. The company explores for rare earth metal, gold, platinum, and palladium deposits. It holds interest in the Hemlo Property located in Ontario; Urban Berry Property located in the Quebec; JAM Beryllium Property situated in the Northern British Columbia; Return Lake PGM Property located in the Quebec; and Wicheeda rare Earth Property located in British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Canadian Energy Materials Corp. and changed its name to Gambier Gold Corp. in February 2020. Gambier Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
